function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context) and finance exactness guidance; read all matched records before summing.
function.outcome_justification: The target service line appears in five invoices read. Four are before 2026-02-01 (2025-10-06, 2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2026-01-17) and one is on/after it (2026-02-26) with line total 240.
